description: A student needs an official letter verifying their full-time enrollment status for their parent's health insurance company.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and check their current enrollment status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student is enrolled full-time for the current semester.

nodes.task_description: Generate a standardized enrollment verification letter from the SIS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the official PDF letter.

nodes.task_description: Email the verification letter to the student.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully emails the document to the student's official university address.
